texto: They were way more interested in learning the alphabet or whatever than they were in learning how to rip a moose in half with their bare hands. Then make a helmet out of its skull. Then to use that helmet to help kill more moose. Collect the skull helmets. Combine. Assemble. Super moose skull helmet. Infinite power.
explicacao: Citação de Bratniss Everclean sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “They were way more interested in learning the alphabet or whatever than they were in learning how…” articula sabedoria, moose-helmet, power em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como power.
